purpose: Guided UI registry for calm local mock-data driven labels, cards, buttons, drawers, actions, and future visual depth controls.

design_system.color_style: dark gamer-tech with restrained cyan, green, amber, and red state colors
design_system.button_style: one unified bordered control style with clear hover and focus states
design_system.spacing_style: breathing room first; dense debug views stay collapsed
design_system.typography_style: short labels, plain English, no giant walls of text
design_system.mobile_style: single column, large touch targets, no horizontal scroll

zones.label: Guided Status
zones.behavior: shows workspace state and next safe action

zones.label: Active Workspace
zones.behavior: one selected workspace dominates the center

zones.label: Details Drawers
zones.behavior: assistant, validator, telemetry, and tool details expand only when needed

zones.label: Radio Utility Dock
zones.behavior: compact playback visibility with advanced controls tucked away

external_trading_platform_placement_rule.path: Trading Lab -> Tools / Connectors -> External Trading Platforms -> MetaTrader 5 / TradingView / TradersPost
progression_gates: User reviews Signal Intake / Risk Gate.
User may view MetaTrader 5 / TradingView / TradersPost planning cards.
Any real login or connection remains blocked until future approval.

cards.label: NEXT ACTION
cards.title: Next Safe Action
cards.description: One clear next step before the user opens deeper details.

cards.label: TRADING LAB
cards.title: Paper-only Trading Lab
cards.description: Signal Intake, Latency, Regime, Risk Gate, Paper Result, Scorecard, Validator Status, and Next Action.

cards.label: SYSTEM STATE
cards.title: System State
cards.description: Compact local mock status with detailed validator output hidden until requested.

system-status.assistant: System Status: local mock-data and config only. Backend, database, broker, deployment, and trading paths remain blocked.
system-status.console:
Ai_Os> System Status
CONFIG: LOCAL MOCK
DATABASE: BLOCKED IN BROWSER
EXTERNAL API: BLOCKED
TRADING: BLOCKED
